definition.label: Code Block (GLSL)
definition.description: Full GLSL function body with loops, conditions and dynamic typed ports. Its title becomes a callable function name in other Code Blocks. One output uses return; multiple outputs are named out parameters.

data.label: Code Block (GLSL)

customNodes.label: Raymarch Step
customNodes.description: One raymarch iteration. State = (distance, done, progress, last SDF distance).

data.label: Raymarch Step Body

data.value:
GLKITTY 2016 — RAYMARCH LOOP

Loop carries vec4 state:
X = ray distance, Y = done, Z = progress, W = last SDF distance.

Double-click Raymarch Step to inspect the iteration. The original mouse rotation is omitted because FlowShader does not expose iMouse yet; time rotation remains.

data.label: Shade Raymarch Result
